seoTitle: Koonwarra vs Koorlong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Koonwarra and Koorlong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Koonwarra and Koorlong.
heading: Koonwarra vs Koorlong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Koonwarra, Victoria and Koorlong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Koonwarra has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Koorlong (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Koonwarra or Koorlong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Koonwarra has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Koorlong scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Koonwarra scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Koorlong scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Koonwarra or Koorlong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Koonwarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
